info.name: WebSphere Liberty Admin REST API
info.description:
RESTful administrative API for WebSphere Liberty servers, providing configuration and runtime management capabilities. The Admin REST Connector enables secure remote access through HTTPS calls or Java clients. Supports server configuration, application management, and feature provisioning.

Contact Support:
 Name: IBM Support
